text:
Once upon a time in the bustling town of Oakwood Grove, there lived a curious squirrel named Sparkler. She loved exploring the ancient oaks that towered over everything else. Her favorite was the Big Gum Cypress where she'd spend hours listening to the crickets play blues.

On a particularly warm autumn day, Sparkler decided she’d unearth some fallen walnuts. She scampered up the tree, feeling a thrill each time she discovered something sweet.

She paused at the crown looking out across the park. That's when she noticed a peculiar thing—a human girl with enormous shoes sitting beneath the walnut tree.

Curious, Sparkler bounded closer. The girl looked up, smiled, and beckoned with one perfectly manicured finger.

"Why don't you come down here?" she asked. Sparkler fluttered down, her tail trembling with excitement.

The girl introduced herself as Willow the Explorer, a big-footed bird who'd spent winters searching lost birdsongs.

"You find trees melancholy?" Willow
